name: Cohere Health
description: Cohere Health offers Cohere Unify™, a clinical intelligence platform that integrates utilization management, payment integrity, appeals, care management, quality, and claims operations for health plans to improve efficiency and financial performance

name: Flatiron Health
description: Flatiron Health aggregates real-world data from millions of cancer patients and uses AI-powered analytics to generate actionable insights that inform treatment decisions and clinical research across oncology

name: Availity
description: Availity operates a national healthcare network platform that connects payers, providers, and health IT vendors to streamline administrative workflows including claims processing, prior authorization, eligibility verification, and payment management

name: Waystar
description: Waystar provides an AI-powered software platform that streamlines healthcare revenue cycle management, including insurance verification, claim processing, denial recovery, and patient billing to accelerate reimbursement and improve financial performance for healthcare providers

name: Myndshft
description: Myndshft provides a unified AI-powered platform that automates both medical and pharmacy prior authorizations in real-time, reducing manual work by up to 90% across the healthcare ecosystem

name: Rhyme
description: Based on the provided website text, Rhyme does not appear to be a healthcare company—it's a social media platform that allows users to curate content by mood preferences

name: CoverMyMeds
description: CoverMyMeds is a digital prior authorization platform that streamlines the process for healthcare providers to obtain insurance approval for prescribed medications

name: Humata Health
description: Humata Health provides an AI-driven prior authorization automation platform that streamlines the approval process for medical procedures, drugs, and payers without requiring EHR integration
